## Testing Checklist

- [ ] Schedule a tab with quick presets

- [ ] View and cancel scheduled tabs
- [ ] Tabs reopen at correct time
- [ ] No console errors in popup or service worker
- [ ] Settings persist correctly
- [ ] Import/export works
